(frozen since ~00:44 UTC 2026-07-17, diagnosed ~11:20 UTC). In the SAME window the Approvals
roster (same bot token, same chat, same sendTelegramMessage/callTelegramApi path) kept
updating, which proves the …
Approval context: LIVE, USER-FACING OUTAGE (the board has been frozen 10h+; you asked "when can I get the pipeline board working again?"). FIRM and already chosen by you at spec time: recover by SELF-HEALING a gone board topic — on a definitive "topic/thread gone" post error, clear the tracked topic id so the next t…
BL-497 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-497" (or "reject BL-497 <reason>") to act.
